citation.description: test_scalar_core_imports_no_jira_adapter uses ast.walk over the full tree; four core modules are in _ZERO_ADAPTER_IMPORT_SCALAR_CORE. Search for adapters.jira and acli_subprocess in the four source files returns zero hits.

criteria.criterion: `fetcher.py`, `applier.py`, `apply_handlers.py`, `_attestation.py` contain NO `adapters.jira`/`acli_subprocess` import at ANY nesting depth — verified by the new full-tree `ast.walk` case in `tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/test_backend_neutrality.py`.

citation.description: BackendEnvError (l.37), BackendAssigneeNotFoundError (l.48), Backend.project (l.319), Backend.query_project (l.329), Backend.assert_env_ready() (l.337) all defined. JiraBackend implements them at backend.py:163-206. FakeBackend has project/query_project/assert_env_ready at backend_support.py:148-162. AssigneeNotFoundError subclasses BackendAssigneeNotFoundError at acli_subprocess.py:148. apply_handlers.py catches BackendAssigneeNotFoundError at l.185. Test suites: test_backend_scalar_surface.py, test_backend_scalar_surface_heldout.py, test_apply_handlers_neutral_assignee.py all exercise the required behaviors.

criteria.criterion: The Backend port exposes `project`, `query_project`, `assert_env_ready()` (raising `BackendEnvError`), and `BackendAssigneeNotFoundError`; `JiraBackend` implements them by delegating to `resolve_jira_settings`; the S2 contract suite and `FakeBackend` are updated to the widened Protocol; behavior is identical — verified by the unit tests named in Testing.

citation.description: Scalar surface section added under §(d) with a table documenting Backend.project, Backend.query_project, Backend.assert_env_ready(), BackendEnvError, and BackendAssigneeNotFoundError, each with responsibility and Jira delegate.

criteria.criterion: ADR 0035 §(d)'s interface table documents the new scalar members and both neutral exceptions — verified by the amended ADR text in the change.

citation.description: All implementation files are complete (no stubs, no xfail/skip markers on the relevant tests, no TODO blocking the features). The code structure is coherent: _backend.py defines the neutral types, JiraBackend implements them, apply_handlers.py catches BackendAssigneeNotFoundError, the AST gate test and scalar surface tests are concrete non-aspirational implementations. No evidence of a broken state in the repository.

criteria.criterion: `make lint && make typecheck && make test` green; whole test tree collects with 0 errors.
